subcodes.first_line: Tyranny hath manifested itself in such wise that pens are powerless to recount it; whereat justice hath lamented and darkness hath enveloped all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهر الظلم علی شان عجزت عن ذکره الاقلام به ناح العدل و اخذت الظلمه کل
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for spiritual recognition
